candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A summary line, but it appears below gross profit alongside operating expense items rather than as a COGS-specific line. Relative to the selected COGS row 'Cost of Goods Sold', there is no explicit COGS-linked D&A row to add separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Component of the total D&A line, not specifically tied to COGS, and should not be chosen over the summary row. It also appears in the operating expense section rather than as a COGS-specific add-on.
Component/specialized depreciation line within operating items, not clearly attributable to COGS and inferior to the summary D&A row for selection purposes.
Component of total D&A and not clearly tied to COGS. Using it would risk incomplete or misbucketed extraction.
Minor component-style line and not clearly attributable to COGS; also inferior to the summary D&A row.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row is presented as a COGS-specific line. The visible D&A rows sit in the operating expense section below gross profit, so they should not be added to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.why: This is the summary D&A line shown as a separate operating expense at the same level as 'Salaries and related expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'. Since the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket contains only those two rows and no SG&A total, this D&A appears outside that selected bucket and should be added separately. Summary row preferred over components to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Component of the total 'Depreciation/Amortization' line. Do not choose when the summary row is available.
Component/specialized detail under total D&A; not preferred when the summary row exists.
Component of total D&A; should not be selected separately because the summary row exists.
Component/detail line and not preferred over the summary D&A row.

variables.notes: OK. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are 'Salaries and related expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'. 'Depreciation/Amortization' is presented as a separate same-level operating line, so it is not already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket and should be added separately. No R&D row is selected, so the special R&D exclusion does not apply.
